understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid and complete all levels by matching your piece's shape, color, and rotation to the requirements of goal cells, then stepping onto them.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game involves moving a piece across a grid to activate and complete goal cells. Moves cost stamina; losing all stamina costs a life and resets stamina, and losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement, indicated by 'blocked_directions'. Modifier tiles change the piece's attributes: shape modifiers cycle shapes (0–5), color modifiers cycle colors (orange → blue → green → red → orange), and rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise (0° → 90° → 180° → 270° → 0°). A goal cell activates only when the piece's shape, color, and rotation all match its requirements; stepping onto an activated goal completes it. Completing all goals advances to the next level.

Moves cost stamina; losing all stamina costs a life and resets stamina, and losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement, indicated by 'blocked_directions'. Modifier tiles change the piece's attributes: shape modifiers cycle shapes (0–5), color modifiers cycle colors (orange → blue → green → red → orange), and rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise (0° → 90° → 180° → 270° → 0°).
